description: Petition submitted to the Fatimid caliph al-Mustanṣir upon his accession in 1036 CE. Requesting that he confirm the appointment of Yosef ha-Kohen, a judge of Alexandria. Goitein writes that the script and style are identical with Halper 354. (Information from Gil, Goitein, and Rustow, Heresy, p. 94 n. 58.) Alternate possibility (from DIMME database): Arabic-script draft of a testimony to be submitted to the government, written by Efrayim b. Shemarya in 1016 CE. Both potential years are therefore listed in the inferred dating of this shelfmark. On verso there is a legal deed in the hand of Efrayim b. Shemarya in which two partners release Yeshuʿa b. Seʿadel from all claims.
description_he: עצומה שהוגשה לח'ליף הפאטמי אל-מוסתנצר עם עלייתו לשלטון ב-1036. מבקשת אישור מינוי יוסף הכהן, שופט אלכסנדריה. גב: שטר משפטי בכתב אפרים ב' שמריה.
